author: Imed Ghomari
description: A media player plugin that watches a folder and plays media across devices. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Imed Ghomari
manifest.description: A media player plugin focused on playback across desktop and mobile devices.
manifest.name: Cross Player

name: Cross Player

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
- Preserved the queue scroll position when jumping to the next media item.
- Preserved the queue scroll position when using queue secondary actions like `Set as Unread`.
- Fixed cleaning consumed media so deleting the currently loaded file no longer shows a false playback error or leaves the stale blank player screen behind.
- Styled file extensions in the media queue with a more muted Obsidian text color to better distinguish them from the media title.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.2.5...1.2.6

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
This patch release improves cross-device syncing for playback progress and fixes a pane-close regression that could reset the saved position back to the beginning.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.2.4...1.2.5

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
This patch release fixes playback progress persistence and queue progress updates for audio files with unstable browser-reported durations, especially mp3.

Highlights:
- Fixed saved playback position updates so they persist during playback instead of only when switching files.
- Fixed queue progress bar updates for mp3 playback.
- Preserved the current playback position when closing the player pane.
- Hardened progress and completion tracking for other media formats that can report duration changes after loading.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.2.3...1.2.4

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
- Removed extra view padding that was leaving wasted space around the player, especially in desktop layouts.
- Repositioned the mobile progress controls so they stay above Obsidian's bottom navigation without sitting unnecessarily high on screen.
- Ensured the progress bar is not tappable when hidden on mobile and tablet.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
This patch release fixes media deletion so cleanup actually frees disk space instead of routing files into Obsidian's local `.trash` folder. 

> [!WARNING]
> If you used earlier versions of the plugin, make sure to clean up the Obsidian trash folder using [the trash explorer plugin](https://github.com/proog/obsidian-trash-explorer).

Highlights:
- Fixed manual queue deletion to permanently remove media files from disk instead of sending them to Obsidian local trash.
- Fixed `Clean Consumed Media` to permanently delete completed files from disk so watched devices do not keep filling up.
- Updated the cleanup confirmation copy and deletion notice to reflect the new permanent-delete behavior.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
- Added support for more browser-playable audiobook and audio formats, including `m4b`, `weba`, `aif`, `aiff`, and `caf`.
- Fixed the mobile progress strip so taps in that area cannot seek or trigger control actions while the overlay is hidden.
- Replaced the hard black bottom padding area with theme-aware spacing so the player blends correctly in light and dark themes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
- Removed the hidden inset around the player so the media view fills the pane more cleanly, especially in light mode.
- Improved mobile fullscreen sizing so the player no longer keeps the bottom toolbar gap in fullscreen landscape.
- Fixed the mobile overlay so hidden controls wake up on first tap instead of triggering actions underneath.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added sync health checks with toast warnings when required plugin files or synced data look incomplete on a device.
- Restored the watched folder more safely after partial sync issues and cleaned queue items outside the selected folder.
- Fixed queue playback speed changes so the queue scroll position stays stable.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This patch release fixes the player overlay interaction regression introduced by the idle placeholder work.

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
Replaced the browser's default empty video placeholder with a cleaner in-app idle state.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
Fixed the overlay progress bar fill so it stays visible in dark mode.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.1...1.1.1

releases.author: imed-ghomari
releases.description:
This release focuses on everyday playback quality, especially on mobile.

Highlights:
- Added a safer `Clean Consumed Media` action in the queue with a confirmation dialog.
- Added optional wrapped queue text for long media names.
- Improved the mobile overlay with a coherent seek bar, visible playback times, and fullscreen access directly from the progress strip.
- Improved mobile fullscreen and tap-to-show overlay behavior.
- Added audio boost and sound normalization options for quiet media.
- Added persistent consumption statistics stored in compact daily buckets.
- Tuned the progress strip to follow the active Obsidian theme better in light and dark mode.
- Add Opus audio support

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.0.3...1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
YouTube extractor compatibility improvements.

**Highlights:**
- Added YouTube extractor argument for Android VR player client compatibility
- Improves YouTube video extraction reliability

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
macOS fixes, JS Runtime support, and YouTube download improvements.

**Highlights:**
- Added JS Runtime Path setting (support for node, deno, or bun for YouTube signature extraction)
- Fixed macOS PATH issues for yt-dlp and ffmpeg discovery
- Improved root folder watching (empty path = watch entire vault)
- Enhanced YouTube download with restricted filenames and format sorting
- Improved download progress detection with better filename extraction
- Added conversion/post-processing detection with destination path parsing
- Auto-scan watched folder after downloads complete with 2-second delay

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Improved playback handling and UI rendering.

**Highlights:**
- Improved playback handling with new `stop()` method to properly reset video state
- Enhanced media position tracking with force parameter
- Fixed UI rendering with progress bar improvements (changed from background gradient to separate progress element)
- Added scroll position persistence for the queue list
- Improved download title detection with multiple parsing strategies
- Context rewind feature: automatically resume 2 seconds before last position
- Better handling of duration mismatches during source transitions

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/imed-ghomari/cross-player-obsidian/commits/1.0.0
